title: Cosmology Deep II: Inflation, Singularities & Quantum Gravity

slow_roll_inflation.key_insight: de Sitter inflation is EML-1 (a = exp(Ht)); slow-roll parameters are EML-2 corrections

graceful_exit_reheating.reheating_transition: EML-∞: non-analytic transition from de Sitter to radiation-dominated FRW
graceful_exit_reheating.key_insight: Inflaton decay is EML-3 (damped oscillation); reheating transition is EML-∞

penrose_theorem.conclusion: A geodesically incomplete singularity necessarily exists
penrose_theorem.reason: Singularity = boundary of spacetime = non-analytic point; cannot be EML-finite

penrose_singularity_and_qg.key_insight: Schwarzschild and Hawking are EML-2 (geometric corrections). LQG area = EML-2 (√(j(j+1))). String landscape and Penrose singularities are EML-∞.

eml_depth_summary.EML-0: Topological invariants: Euler characteristic of Calabi-Yau
eml_depth_summary.EML-1: de Sitter scale factor a=exp(Ht), Hubble rate H=√(V/3), reheat temperature
eml_depth_summary.EML-2: Slow-roll parameters ε/η, Schwarzschild radius, Hawking temperature, LQG area
eml_depth_summary.EML-3: Inflaton oscillation (damped cosine), gravitational wave strain
eml_depth_summary.EML-\u221e: Reheating transition, Penrose singularities, string landscape, Big Bang

key_theorem: The EML Cosmological Depth Theorem: Inflationary expansion (de Sitter) is EML-1 — same universality class as Boltzmann equilibria and path integral amplitudes. Quantum gravity corrections (Hawking, LQG) are EML-2. All singularities (Big Bang, black hole interior, Penrose) are EML-∞: they are the cosmological instances of the EML-∞ barrier.
rabbit_hole_log: de Sitter expansion = EML-1: confirms Grand Synthesis VII universality principle
Inflaton oscillation = damped cosine = EML-3 (same class as GW strain)
LQG area = 8πγ l_P² √(j(j+1)): square root of quadratic = EML-2
String landscape: 10^500 vacua = log(N) EML-∞ enumeration problem
Penrose theorem: singularity = EML-∞ by geodesic incompleteness

connections.S61_qft_free: Path integral Z=exp(-S) = EML-1 (same as de Sitter scale factor)
connections.S77_gr_deep: Schwarzschild/Kerr metrics = EML-2; Penrose singularity = EML-∞
connections.S75_qft_interacting: Phase transitions in cosmology (reheating) = EML-∞ (same as confinement)
connections.S130_grand_synthesis_7: Cosmological singularities are maximal EML-∞ instances
